# opnsense_trust_cert (Data Source)

Retrieves an end-entity certificate from the OPNsense Trust store by UUID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "opnsense_trust_cert" "example" {
  id = "<uuid>"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID of the certificate.

### Read-Only

- `action` (String)
- `altnames_dns` (String)
- `altnames_email` (String)
- `altnames_ip` (String)
- `altnames_uri` (String)
- `caref` (String) Reference ID of the signing CA.
- `cert_type` (String)
- `city` (String)
- `common_name` (String)
- `country` (String)
- `crt` (String) Base64-encoded PEM certificate body.
- `crt_payload` (String)
- `csr` (String) Base64-encoded PEM CSR.
- `csr_payload` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `digest` (String)
- `email` (String)
- `in_use` (String)
- `is_user` (String)
- `key_type` (String)
- `lifetime` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `ocsp_uri` (String)
- `organization` (String)
- `organizational_unit` (String)
- `private_key_location` (String)
- `prv_payload` (String, Sensitive)
- `ref_id` (String) Short hex reference ID used by other OPNsense subsystems.
- `rfc3280_purpose` (String)
- `state` (String)
- `valid_from` (String)
- `valid_to` (String)
